headline: Episode 19
summary: Headlines include coronavirus pandemic in the UK and the US, Ghislaine Maxwell and Twitter Inc
body_text:
This edition features these stories from ft.com

UK to expand Covid booster jab campaign to all adults

Omicron threatens US economic recovery, warns Powell

Ghislaine Maxwell described as ‘predator’ at sex-trafficking trial

Jack Dorsey resigns as Twitter chief executive
